articles.title: [속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관 66] 아는 길도 물어가라(6)-보이스피싱 의심되면 꼭 해야 할 행동
articles.description: 보이스피싱 의심 시 112 또는 1332에 신고하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다. 속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다. 보안은 어렵지 않다. 지키느냐,
articles.summary: 보이스피싱 의심 시 112 또는 1332에 신고하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다. 그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다...
points: 보이스피싱 의심 시 112 또는 1332에 신고하세요보안 사고의 90%는 해킹이 아니라 ‘실수’에서 시작된다
그래서 우리는 기술보다 습관을 배워야 한다
속담으로 배우는 100가지 보안 습관에서는 △스마트폰 보안 △계정·비밀번호 △PC·인터넷 △생활 보안 △금융·개인정보 등 100가지 보안 습관을 속담과 연관시켜 소개한다
articles.insight: 이 뉴스는 IT 업계의 최신 동향을 보여주며, 기술 발전과 시장 변화에 대한 중요한 정보를 제공합니다.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] 에스투더블유, AI 기반 데이터 인텔리전스 기술력으로 안보 위협 대응 지원
articles.description: 안보·보안 AI 제품 수출로 해외 매출 비중 20% 상회아시아, 중동, 유럽 시장 진출[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 빅데이터 분석 인공지능(AI) 기업 에스투더블유(S2W)는 인터폴(INTERPOL) 민관협력 프로그램 ‘게이트웨이 이니셔티브(Gateway Initiative)’의 한국 유일 파트너이자 ‘마이크로소프트 시큐리티 코파일럿(Microsoft Secur
articles.summary: 이에서 S2W은 인터폴의 게시기 모드로 한국 파트너로 진전하고, GI 프로그램을 통해 국제 활동을 수행합니다.
points: - S2W은 인터폴의 게시기 모드로 한국 파트너로 진전하였음에도 이를 위해
- GI 프로그램을 통해 국제 활동을 수행
- S2W은 AI를 이용한 결과물 생산기 개체를 개정하여 대표형식으로 제출
articles.insight: 기사는 S2W이 AI를 이용한 보안 제품에 대한 국제적인 활동과 제출에 관한 내용을 제시합니다. 많은 IT/기술 기업이 마스터스트렘지력의 AI를 사용하여 보안 제품을 개정하고 생산한다면, S2W의 경향성은 매우중요합니다.

articles.title: [ISEC 2026 미리보기] Hash 기반 실시간 멀웨어 탐지 및 대응 솔루션 ‘TA-STR’, 보안 사각지대 해소
articles.description: 다양한 멀웨어 위협 실시간으로 탐지, 추적, 분석해 즉각 대응[보안뉴스 엄호식 기자] 아이티스테이션은 2001년 설립 이래 약 25년간 정보보호솔루션 개발에 주력해 온 보안 전문 기업이다. 지속적인 연구개발을 통해 CC인증, GS인증 등 다수의 보안 인증을 획득했으며, 혁신적인 기술력으로 400여개 이상의 고객사를 확보하고 있다.최근에는 지능형 엔드포인트
articles.summary: 이슈사이트에서 제공하는 'TA-STR' 시스템은 약 25년간의 정보보호솔루션을 개발한 아이티스테이션이다. 이 기술에서는 사용자가 여러분의 시스템과 IT 구성에 대한 보안을 강제로 인식하도록 함으로써, 현실세계에서 일어나는 코드공학력이나 양자화되어가는 대칭오버파견에 대한 미리보기를 제공한다.
points: - 'TA-STR' 시스템은 사용자의 시스템과 IT 구성을 잘리듯하게 보호하도록 설정할 수 0있다.
- AI/ML를 이용한 'TA-STR'는 심층으로 진동하고, 현재 가격은 3밖에 오차 가능하다.
- AI/ML 기반 시스템이란 'TA-STR'는 대칭오버파견, 코드공학력이나 양자화되어가는 악하한 활동에 대한 미리보기를 제공.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 IT/기술 업계에서의 'TA-STR' 시스템이란 현재 AI/ML 기반으로 진동하고, 보호의 방식은 일반적으로 불안정한 활동을 대신하여, 사용자의 시스템과 IT 구성에 대해서 일반적으로 보호를 위해 필요한 수정이 없다는 것을 강조하고, 이를 기반으로 공급가 유리로 인식하지만, AI/ML에의 오버할 여지가 있어서 외부 사용자가 이미 보호되어 있는 정도로 광범위하게 제공한다.

articles.title: Applications close in 48 hours — here’s everything Australian founders need to know about Stripe x Startup Battlefield
articles.description: The window is almost shut. On August 19, eight startups will take the stage at Stripe Tour Sydney in front of investors, global press, and the Australian tech community. One startup walks away with automatic entry into TechCrunch Disrupt in San Francisco — no application, no further competition, a guaranteed spot on the world’s most […]
articles.summary: Eight Australian startups will compete for automatic entry into TechCrunch Disrupt in San Francisco during Stripe Tour Sydney.
points: Startup competition at the event offers direct access to a global stage and potential investor attention.
Automatic qualifiers include pitching, networking opportunities with industry leaders present as observers or judges may be from VentureBeat's ranks.
articles.insight: This provides Australian startups an unprecedented opportunity for exposure to international tech networks and potential investment. It highlights the growing global collaboration within the startup ecosystem, demonstrating how events like Stripe Tour Sydney can significantly benefit emerging companies in a competitive industry.

articles.title: Vertu wants executives to pay $6,880 for an AI agent — here’s how it actually performs
articles.description: From AI workflows to battery life and security, here's what it's really like to live with Vertu's luxury foldable every day.
articles.summary: Vertu introduces a pricey AI agent for executives claiming benefits in efficiency and personal assistance but faces scrutiny over actual performance.
points: - Vertu's luxury foldable AI assistant is priced at $6,880 per executive.
- The device purportedly offers features like automating workflow processes to save time for the user.
- There are questions about whether its performance justifies such a high price point.
articles.insight: The release of Vertu's AI agent raises concerns regarding cost-effectiveness and actual value provided, potentially affecting future investments in similar technology products within the industry.

articles.title: Databricks hits $188B valuation, extending its run as AI’s favorite second act
articles.description: Databricks has remade its image into an AI company and has published research on the cost savings of open weight AI models for coding.
articles.summary: Databricks is now valued at $188 billion after rebranding as a leading artificial intelligence company and publishing research on cost savings with open AI models.
points: Databricks has successfully shifted its brand identity to focus more prominently on artificial intelligence, evidenced by an impressive $188 billion valuation following the announcement of this strategic pivot earlier in May. The company's founder and CEO Dounia Chevalier highlighted Databricks as a 'rebranding platform that takes existing data science tools like RStudio to scale,' which has resonated well within Silicon Valley.

Chevalier emphasized the importance of open AI models in reducing costs for businesses, not only through increased efficiency but also by potentially eliminating expenses related to consultants and specialists. This aligns with Databricks' broader mission as an enterprise platform that facilitates collaboration among data scientists.

Databricks has demonstrated its ambition in the AI field not just through rebranding but by publishing research on leveraging open weight machine learning models to aid coding efforts, which is a significant development considering they previously focused more narrowly as an analytics engine.
articles.insight: Databricks' pivot towards becoming a hub for AI innovation and collaborative tools represents the industry trend of integrating data science with broader business applications. Their valuation growth post-rebranding underscores the increasing importance placed on accessible, scalable platforms that democratize advanced analytics technologies.

articles.title: The Zoom hack that says, ‘Don’t record me’
articles.description: If every meeting, watercooler conversation, and date gets transcribed and summarized, who's actually reading any of it?
articles.summary: The article discusses the increasing trend in audio-recorded workplace interactions as facilitated by Zoom meetings during remote working periods and raises privacy concerns over recorded content being transcribed without consent.
points: A new 'Do Not Record' feature developed for video calls allows participants to opt out of recording, sparking debate about meeting confidentiality standards in the workplace.
The widespread adoption of remote working has led businesses and individuals alike to record more meetings using platforms like Zoom without clear policies or consent from all parties involved.
Without proper handling and authorization protocols, transcribed meeting content can lead to privacy violations as information is made available outside the intended audience.
articles.insight: This news highlights an important intersection of technology usage for productivity and data security within remote work environments. It underscores potential legal implications regarding recording consent while advocating a reevaluation of meeting protocols to protect employee privacy rights.

articles.title: Agility Robotics plants its flag in Tesla’s backyard
articles.description: Agility is opening a new training center for its Digit robots in Fremont, California.
articles.summary: Agility Robotics has opened a new robotic arm (Digit) production and customer service facility near Tesla'selocality of Fremont in California.
points: The Agility Automation company announced the opening of its latest Digit training center for repairing, maintaining, assembling robots right next to a new Gigafactory at their backyard (Fremont, CA).
Agility claims that this move will create over 50 jobs in California and provide hands-on experience while working with the automation company's advanced robotic arms.
The Digit has been designed to perform simple tasks such as picking up objects from a conveyor belt or placing items into boxes, making it an ideal fit for Agility Automation.
articles.insight: This development marks the expansion of industrial automation in California and signifies how robotics are increasingly being used not only to replace jobs but also create new ones. It is expected that this collaboration could enhance Tesla's manufacturing capabilities through improved training for technicians.

articles.title: AI-driven memory crunch jolts India’s smartphone market
articles.description: India's smartphone slowdown highlights how the AI boom is reshaping consumer electronics, from pricing and demand to corporate strategy.
articles.summary: In India, a growing memory chip shortage caused by an intense focus on artificial intelligence (AI) has led to smartphone sales declining in recent years. This shift signifies the impact of AI advancements and scarcity issues on consumer electronics markets.
points: A severe global semiconductor chip shortage is affecting India's tech industry, specifically causing a slowdown in smartphone sales due to insufficient memory chips for production.

The demand shift towards AI-focused devices has reallocated resources and manufacturing efforts away from traditional consumer electronics like smartphones. This highlights how the increasing importance of artificial intelligence is influencing market dynamics across various industries, including tech sectors worldwide.

Although India's economy heavily depends on technology sales as a leading export commodity for foreign exchange earnings and employment generation in electronics manufacturing hubs like Silicon Valley City (SVC), the current AI-driven memory crunch underscores vulnerabilities within its domestic tech supply chain, suggesting that it might need to reassess sourcing strategies.
articles.insight: This semiconductor shortage in India and elsewhere has demonstrated how technological advancements can significantly influence consumer markets. It underscores the importance of diversification within tech industries, especially as they navigate supply chain vulnerabilities amidst AI-driven growth.

articles.title: Apple and Google ordered to purge ‘nudify’ apps from App Stores
articles.description: In letters sent to Apple and Google, San Francisco City Attorney David Chiu said that both companies have long been aware that they are hosting apps in violation of state law.
articles.summary: San Francisco's city attorney has ordered Apple and Google to remove nudity-promoting 'nudify' applications from their app stores due to a violation of state law.
points: Apple and Google received legal letters demanding the removal of apps in breach of California laws regarding sexual content for minors.

The specific legislation cited is known as Nudity-Related Crimes Against Children Act, which prohibits commercial distribution within a 100-foot radius from schools or places where children are present and bans the sale in general merchandise stores.
articles.insight: This action by San Francisco City Attorney reflects growing concerns over digital content regulation to protect minors, setting a precedent for future legal actions against social media platforms hosting adult material accessible online. This could encourage other jurisdictions with similar intentions or laws.

articles.title: Nuclear startup Valar Atomics in talks to raise new funding at $6B valuation
articles.description: The potential deal highlights a growing trend of complex, multi-stage funding rounds that mask true entry prices.
articles.summary: Valar Atomics is in discussions to raise new capital at an enterprise value of $6 billion for its nuclear startup.
points: Potential deal indicates a trend towards multi-stage funding rounds obscuring actual entry prices
Deal signals growing confidence among investors and the market in advanced energy projects like Valar Atomics's small modular reactors (SMRs)
The financing round could accelerate development, deployment of SMR technology
articles.insight: This funding trend suggests that despite potential complexities, investor confidence remains high in innovative energy solutions with a focus on sustainability and security.

articles.title: I replaced my space heater and ceiling fan with one Dyson appliance
articles.description: Designed for year-round comfort, the Dyson Hot+Cool HF1 combines quiet operation and simple controls with Dyson's signature bladeless design.
articles.summary: The article introduces a dual-function device by Dyson called the Hot+Cool HF1 that provides both heating and cooling while emphasizing its unique bladeless design and ease of use.
points: Dyson launches the Hot+Cool HF1, an appliance providing space heating and cooling
The product features Dyson'ner’s signature silent operation and intuitive control system with its unique bladeless fan design for added convenience.
Targeted at consumers seeking a single device to manage indoor comfort year-round, the Hot+Cool HF1 represents an evolution of space heaters in modern appliance technology.
articles.insight: The release of Dyson's combined heating and cooling system demonstrates growing demand for multifunctional home devices that can adapt to changing seasons efficiently, potentially impacting future designs within the industry.

articles.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
articles.description: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the company. OpenAI’s response so far has been carefully hedged, and the timing couldn’t be worse with the company reportedly eyeing an IPO […]
articles.summary: Apple's lawsuit against OpenAI alleges misconduct involving former employees and could impact OpenAI's imminent plans for a public stock offering.
points: Apple has filed a significant trade secrets complaint against OpenAI, claiming wrongdoing by some of the company's key figures including its chief hardware officer. The lawsuit also states that over 400 former Apple employees now work at OpenAI.

OpenAI is reportedly planning an IPO and has been cautious in responding to the trade secrets suit, avoiding statements about how this could affect their plans directly or indirectly due to legal proceedings against a major competitor like Apple. This comes amidst tensions over OpenAI's increasing market presence.
The timing of the lawsuit is particularly disruptive for what appears to be an imminent IPO, potentially causing investor unease and impacting financial forecasts.
articles.insight: This legal confrontation between Apple and a major player like OpenAI may cause instability within the tech sector as companies navigate public perceptions of misconduct while planning significant events such as IPOs.

articles.title: FBI arrests man accused of using Steam games to drain victims’ crypto wallets
articles.description: Prosecutors accused 21-year-old student Zyaire Wilkins of publishing on Steam several fake video games that contained malware, infecting thousands of victims, and stealing crypto from some of them.
articles.summary: FBI has arrested Zyaire Wilkins for using Steam to distribute fake video games with malware that targeted cryptocurrency wallets.
points: 21-year-involved in the creation and distribution of deceptive stealthcryptomining software through seemingly legitimate gaming platforms
Affects thousands, some losses reaching tens to hundreds of dollars due to drained digital currency wallets linked via malware embedded video games
Investigation uncovers extensive network spanning multiple states and involving victims with significant monetary loss
articles.insight: The case highlights the growing intersection between online gaming ecosystems, cryptocurrency exploits, and cybercrime tactics targeting digital assets.

articles.title: Parents want safer phones for kids. These companies are answering the call.
articles.description: As parents look for alternatives to unrestricted smartphones, a growing number of companies are building phones designed specifically for kids, from feature-limited mobile devices to minimalist home phones.
articles.summary: Amid concerns over inappropriate content and screen time on smartphones used by children, various companies are creating safer phone options for kids.
points: Companies like Fairphone, LG Electronics, Vodafone Idea Limited (VIL), Sony Mobile Communications Corporation, Lenovo Group Ltd., and Huawei Technologies Co.Ltd have announced new devices targeting children as young as six.
The proposed kids' phones will come with features such as content limitations like age-specific app stores and screen timers to manage usage effectively.

These companies are actively seeking feedback on the concept, indicating a collaborative approach between parents, educators, experts in child psychology, technologists, designers, and children themselves.
articles.insight: The emergence of purpose-built kids' phones signals an industry acknowledgment that mobile devices must be designed with the wellbeing and developmental needs of young users at heart. This not only has implications for product design but also indicates a broader societal shift towards more responsible digital consumption by children.

articles.title: Amazon fixing bug that billed some AWS customers billions of dollars
articles.description: Some Amazon customers logged on Friday to a surprise bill estimate claiming that they owed the tech and cloud giant billions in fees.
articles.summary: Amazon discovered and fixed a bug within its billing system for AWS customers which erroneously charged them with large sums of money.
points: An error in Amazon's software caused incorrect pricing calculations on the billings sent to some AWS customer accounts, leading to unexpectedly high charges over time.

The issue was not immediately apparent due to its subtle nature and may have been operating for years undetected. This bug could potentially affect hundreds of thousands or even millions of customers in various regions worldwide.
Upon discovery through a customer inquiry, Amazon undertocurred extensive internal investigations which led them to identify the root cause as software error within their billing system.
articles.insight: This incident highlights potential vulnerabilities and reliability issues in cloud computing services' pricing structures. As organizations increasingly rely on third-party providers for critical operations, incidents like this emphasize the need for diligent auditing of service agreements to ensure accuracy and fairness.

articles.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
articles.description: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.
articles.summary: Patreon is collaborating with Cloudflare to combat AI content scraping by blocking bots from using creators' work without consent.
points: Patreon and Cloudflare are teaming up against unautbanized AI model training
AI models often scrape Patreon’s user-generated content for free learning material
This block prevents bots from using creator's work to train without permission
articles.insight: The partnership reflects growing concerns over AI ethics and copyright, potentially leading other platforms to enhance their anti-scraping measures.

articles.title: reMarkable’s new Paper Pure is good. That’s why I wrote this review on it.
articles.description: Remarkable's Paper Pure replaces Remarkable 2, and it is quite good.
articles.summary: The article reviews the new Paper Pure device from reMarkable, noting that while there are some drawbacks such as an unresponsive touchscreen and a lack of Bluetooth connectivity for transferring handwritten notes to computers or tablets, it remains good overall. The author expresses disappointment with Remarkable's decision to discontinue software development but finds the hardware impressive.
points: Paper Pure is an excellent device despite its unresponsive touchscreen and lack of Bluetooth connectivity for transferring handwritten notes, which are significant downsides as it essentially replaces Remarkable 2

Despite the discontinuation of software development by reMarkable post-launch to focus on hardware improvements exclusively (hence 'Paper Pure'), this decision led to criticism due to users' disappointment in not having access to their handwritten notes outside paper format anymore.

The author acknowledges that while some might disagree, especially as the original purpose of Remarkable was for digital note-taking and document capturing (with a focus on collaboration), there are still numerous individuals who find Paper Pure useful due to its standalone hardware capabilities.
articles.insight: The news highlights reMarkable's strategic decision to prioritize hardware development over software, which resulted in mixed feedback from users. While the company ceased providing updates for Remarkable apps post-launch and limited Paper Pure solely as a standalone device without Bluetooth connectivity or note transfer capabilities, there remains an appreciation among certain segments of its user base.

articles.title: No product? No problem. This Disrupt 2026 session shows how to get pre-seed funding with conviction, storytelling
articles.description: It’s not just you: AI startups are taking in a huge amount of seed funding, and in the process making things harder for anyone looking for funding even at a pre-seed stage. We’ve covered the trend in detail, and at this year’s TechCrunch Disrupt event, we want to help pre-seed founders now being held to seed-stage […]
articles.summary: AI startups are monopolizing a significant portion of available funding, particularly in the later stages like seed and series A rounds. As these companies flood forward with investments year after year, it's becoming increasingly difficult for early-stage pre-seed ventures to secure financing.
points: AI startups are dominating available funding at Seed/Series A stages in the past few years
The tech industry is witnessing a trend where investors prefer backing later-stage companies, leading pre-seed ventures to struggle for financing opportunities
Disrupt 2026 session offers strategies and conviction techniques essential for securing fundraising at the critical early stage
articles.insight: The Disrupt 2026 event provides a platform for pre-seed founders to learn how to navigate through tougher startup ecosystems, emphasizing storytelling and conviction as tools for attracting potential investors in an AI-driven funded environment.

articles.title: Zoox issues software recall after a robotaxi got confused by heavy smoke
articles.description: The recall comes as the top automotive safety regulator in the U.S. has warned AV companies about their vehicles interfering with first responders.
articles.summary: Zoox is recalling a robotaxi after it became disoriented during heavy smoke from an inferno in Los Angeles.
points: Azoox's fleet has been recalled due to potential safety issues experienced by one of their vehicles under extreme weather conditions.
articles.insight: This incident highlights the importance of considering environmental factors and emergency situations when developing autonomous vehicle (AV) technology, as well as ensuring robust communication with first responders during such events.

articles.title: Why the first GPU financiers are turning to inference chips in a $400 million deal
articles.description: A $400 million chip-backed loan points to the next wave of AI infrastructure deals.
articles.summary: NVIDIA and Intel are closing a massive deal for an NVIDIA inference GPU server system worth $400 million.
points: First-time chip financiers AMD and Alphabet turn to chipsets
$400M in financing, with upfront purchase of hardware from Microsemi
Inference computing is key for enterprise applications
articles.insight: This deal signifies a shifting paradigm towards inference-centric AI solutions within the IT industry.

articles.title: “섀도우 AI 음지에서 양지로”... 쏘카의 자율형 보안 거버넌스 사례
articles.description: 생산성 향상 이면에 가려진 기밀 유출, ‘바이브 코딩’ 취약점 리스크단절된 통제 탈피해 현업 부서와 소통해 인센티브 기반 자율보안 뼈대 수립[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “생산성 향상을 위한 임직원들의 미인가 AI 사용 이른바 ‘섀도우 AI’는 보안 가시성을 붕괴시키는 치명적 위협입니다. 강압적인 차단 정책은 한계에 직면했으며, 보이지 않는 위험을 자동화된 검증
articles.summary: 생산성 향상 이면에 가려진 기밀 유출, ‘바이브 코딩’ 취약점 리스크단절된 통제 탈피해 현업 부서와 소통해 인센티브 기반 자율보안 뼈대 수립[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] “생산성 향상을 위한 임직원들의 미인가 AI 사용 이른바 ‘섀도우 AI’는 보안 가시성을 붕괴시키는 치명적 위협입니다. 강압적인 차단 정책은 한계에 직면했으며, 보이지 않는 위험을 자동화된 검증
points: 강압적인 차단 정책은 한계에 직면했으며, 보이지 않는 위험을 자동화된 검증
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드
IT 업계의 중요한 변화와 트렌드

articles.title: [Global Security TOP 100] 김병훈 이스트시큐리티 CTO “AI 시대, 도메인 지식으로 방어”
articles.description: 1600만 사용자 보안 데이터 자산 삼아 AI 기반 통합 보안 플랫폼 도약 AI 모델 자체 보호하는 ‘Security for AI’ 철학 이식한 EDR 2.0 출격 [보안뉴스 조재호 기자] AI 고도화는 사이버 공격의 기획부터 실행까지 전 과정을 자동화하며 방어 패러다임의 근본적 전환을 강제하고 있다. 단순히 인공지능(AI)을 방어 도구로 쓰는 것을 넘
articles.summary: 김병훈이의 이스트시큐리티 CTO가 AI로 방어하는 방법과 EDR 2.0와의 중요성에대한 소개
points: AI기반 보안 제공을 위해 EDR 2.0를 도임
AI는 전체 방어와 함께 진전한 방범가 점검 및 방어
AI의 이용은 사용자 보안에 기여하고 인공지능을 강화하기 위해 필요합니다.
articles.insight: 이 기사는 AI를 사용한 방어와 EDR의 중요성에대한 IT/기술 업계에 대한 더 잘리시당함을 보여줍니다.

articles.title: 카스퍼스키, ‘인포스틸러’ 감염 35%는 임시 폴더서 시작해
articles.description: 2025년 다크웹 정보 탈취 로그 500만개 분석 결과 담은 보고서 공개프로세스 인젝션·LOL 기법 악용한 고도화 감염 사례도 전체 32% 달해[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 카스퍼스키가 지난해 다크웹에서 발견된 악성코드 로그를 분석한 결과, 전체 감염의 35%가 사용자의 브라우저 임시 폴더 파일 실행에서 비롯되었다고 발표했다. 공격자는 고도화된 해킹 기술보다 불

articles.title: [카드뉴스] “로봇청소기가 해커의 무기로?”… 패치 없는 저가형 IoT 기기가 부른 ‘봇넷’의 경고
articles.description: 무선 펌웨어 업데이트(OTA) 및 패치 기능이 부재한 저가형 IoT 가전제품들이 봇넷(Botnet)의 포섭 대상이 되며 사후 조치가 불가능한 ‘영원한 취약점’으로 작용하고 있다. 공격자들은 방화벽을 직접 뚫는 대신 사용자가 직접 도입한 미검증 스마트 기기를 ‘가장 약한 고리’로 삼아 내부망으로 침투하거나 거대 디도스 공격 거점으로 악용한다. 단말기 출시 후
articles.summary: 이 기사는 사용자가 '가장 약한 고리'로 미검증 스마트 기기를 불량한 취약점으로 포진하고, 이를 위해 공격자는 거대 디도스 공격 대상을 살환한다.
points: 사용자가 미네요 스마트 기기로 구성된 봇넷(Botnet)의 고소도를 이용
대상은 인터넷컨트롤, 회사 시스템, 그리고 사용자 계정에서 직접 조치를 요구하고 있다
이 뉴스는 IT/기술 업계가 '영원한 취약점'를 의미한다.
articles.insight: 이 보도는 IoT 기기가 사용자가 대체로 신뢰하고 안전하지 않은 상태로 인식할 수 0ne다.

articles.title: “임직원부터 지역사회까지 챙긴다” 시큐아이, 삼복맞이 나눔 행사 진행
articles.description: 복날 맞이 음식 제공해 임직원 사기 진작 도모임직원 봉사단 꾸려 복지관 대상 배식 봉사 진행[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 시큐아이가 임직원과 지역사회가 건강한 여름을 보낼 수 있도록 다양한 삼복맞이 이벤트를 진행했다고 16일 밝혔다. 삼복 이벤트는 무더위에 지친 임직원을 격려하고 활기찬 조직 문화를 조성하기 위해 기획된 시큐아이의 대표적인 연례 사내 행사다.올해
articles.summary: 시큐아이는 임직원과 지역사회를 건강하게 여름을 보내게 되어 있다.
points: 시큐아이가 적육과 지식교육을 진행한다
인기저볼로 꿈의 상엌에서 대한 활동이다
이 사항은 IT/기술 업체에서 습납을 덜어 일하는 창세인들의 도움이다
articles.insight: 시큐아이 계약은 IT/기술 업체에서의 소통과 협력방식을 제시하며, 일부 승진자들이 글로맨스를 볼 수 0이다

articles.title: 빗장 풀린 공공 AI 틈새 막는다... 윈스테크넷, 차등 보안 통제 거버넌스
articles.description: KISA 망분리 맞춰 정보 중요도 기반 아키텍처 제시획일적 차단 넘어선데이터 분류 체계로 디지털 혁신 지원[보안뉴스 조재호 기자] 윈스테크넷이 생성형 AI 데이터 보안 솔루션 ‘SNIPER AIVAX’를 앞세워 국가망보안체계(N2SF) 대응 시장 공략을 본격화한다고 15일 밝혔다.최근 한국인터넷진흥원(KISA)은 과학기술정보통신부와 함께 국가 및 공공기관의
articles.summary: KISA, 과학기술정보통신부와의 협업에서 국가및공격을 대항하기 위해 온라인 사용자를 분류하는 SNIPER AIVAX 소프트웨어이다.
points: KISA와 함껸한 국가및공격을 대항하기 위해 SNIPER AIVAX 개발
온라인 사용자를 분류하여 정보 중요도 이해하는 기능
국가 및 공격을 대항하기 위한 국가망보안체계에서의 시장 공략 본격화
articles.insight: 이 신속한 AI 보안 소프트웨어는 국가 사내에서 인공지하기를 제어하고, 공게성능 및 예산 부여든 다름을 가지게 함

articles.title: SpaceX suddenly aborts second Starship V3 launch after ignition
articles.description: The company didn't immediately say what went wrong. SpaceX's stock plunged more than 4% in after-hours trading before paring losses.
articles.summary: SpaceX aborted the second launch of Starship V3 moments after ignition due to an unspecified issue, causing a significant drop in its stock price.
points: Starship'sem momentous first flight ended with explosive failure
Second attempt also failed leading to speculation on issues such as propellant delivery system and fuel flow rates
SpaceX shares dropped more than 4% after-hours following the launch abort
articles.insight: The SpaceX Starship development faces technical challenges that require further investigation, indicating potential delays in achieving a successful orbital flight.

articles.title: Coca-Cola suspended production at its Fairlife dairy after a ransomware attack
articles.description: Coca Cola said dairy production at its Fairlife unit will "remain suspended" in the United States following a hack.
articles.summary: Following a ransomware attack on their systems, Coca-Cola has temporarily halted dairy production at its Fairlife unit in the United States.
points: Coca Cola's Fairlife U. endures hack
Dairy production suspended across US facilities due to security breach
Ransom demand not mentioned, but concern for continued business disrufort
articles.insight: This incident highlights the vulnerability of critical infrastructure in essential industries like food and beverage manufacturing to cyber threats.

articles.title: Roblox launches an AI-powered game creation feature in its mobile app
articles.description: Roblox's new "Build" feature lets users generate basic games using a single text prompt.
articles.summary: The Roblox gaming platform has introduced an AI-powered game creation tool within its mobile application named 'Build.' This feature enables users to create simple games by typing a single text prompt.
points: Roblox introduces the new AI-based Create mode, called Build
The basic concept behind this is that people can use just one line of input or instruction and let Robux generate what happens next in their game
This feature has been made for users to test ideas without requiring coding knowledge
articles.insight: Roblox'self Build mode could expand its user base by attracting individuals with little programming experience, ultimately increasing engagement and revenue from Robux sales. This development may also prompt a broader conversation about the accessibility of game creation tools in the IT industry.

articles.title: Oil giant BP shutters its corporate venture arm after 20 years
articles.description: BP Ventures is shutting down, ending a nearly 20-year run that was marked by reportedly lackluster returns.
articles.summary: After almost two decades of operation, BP's corporate venture arm has ceased its activities due to underperforming investments.
points: BP Ventures is ending after nearly twenty years
Reportedly lackluster returns marked the company'sen run
The closure comes as a strategic decision
articles.insight: This development indicates that oil companies might need to reassess their investment in venture capital, possibly impacting future collaborations within and outside of traditional sectors.

articles.title: Uber’s $14.8B Delivery Hero deal would nearly double its global footprint
articles.description: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world’s largest food-delivery platforms outside China.
articles.summary: Uber has agreed to acquire Delivery Hero in a $14.8 billion all-stock deal that would nearly double the company’s global footprint and create one of the world's largest food delivery platforms outside China.
points: Delivery Hero is Sweden's top tech startup, founded by Swedish entrepreneurs in London as a restaurant review site named ChilliChineese.com which was rebranded to FoodHero upon finding interest from restaurants and customers globally
The Uber deal with Delivery Hero involves an all-stock transaction that is expected to be finalized later this year, after regulatory approvals are secured.
Founded in 2006 as a restaurant review site focused on Chinese food, Delivery Hero expanded its operations globally by acquiring similar local brands like UberEats and Foodpanda.
articles.insight: The deal signifies the growing trend of consolidation within the fast-growing global delivery industry as companies look to expand their reach, improve efficiency through economies of scale, while also integrating innovative technology solutions. With Uber's investment in Delivery Hero and its acquisition by another major company - GrubHub last year - there is an increasing likelihood that the food-delivery sector will witness further consolidation.

articles.title: Newsletter platform Beehiiv now lets subscribers chat with each other, adds AI
articles.description: Beehiiv is launching an AI Copilot to help publishers with user growth and analytics.
articles.summary: The IT newsletter platform Beehiiv has introduced a feature allowing subscribers to communicate directly within the app.
points: Beehiiv introduces an AI Copilot for user growth and analytics assistance
New direct messaging functionality among subscribers
AI-powered personalization capabilities
articles.insight: The integration of communication features in Beehiv might encourage community building, leading to organic growth through word-of-mouth referrals.

articles.title: X cracks down on creators who steal content
articles.description: X will use Grok AI to better detect stolen content, redirect payouts to original creators, and crack down on engagement bait.
articles.summary: Content platform X is implementing strategies using Grok AI for detecting stolen content and ensuring that payouts go directly to original creators.
points: Platform X introduces new measures with Grok AI
Stealing credits will redirect earnings back to rightful owners
Engagement bait tactics are being targeted
articles.insight: The article indicates a growing concern over the protection of intellectual property within content platforms, which may lead industry-wide discussions and changes in policies.

articles.title: AI-powered travel agency Fora hits unicorn status, raises $60M
articles.description: Travel agency Fora announced a $60 million Series D round led by Forerunner and Tactile Ventures, valuing the company at $1 billion.
articles.summary: Founded in May 2017 with a focus on AI-driven personalized travel experiences for high net worth individuals and businesses, Fora raised its Series D round to $60 million from investors like Sequoia Capital Asia.
points: Forbes named AI-powered personalization startup 'one of the hottest startups in tech,' reaching a valuation that puts it among Silicon Valley'self unicorns.
articles.insight: Further investment could enable Fora to expand its customer base beyond high net worth individuals and refine AI technology for broader market adoption, potentially revolutionizing the travel industry with personalized experiences powered by machine learning.

articles.title: Google’s AI Mode now lets you link and interact with select apps
articles.description: With this new update, Google is expanding AI Mode beyond answering questions and into completing tasks across the apps they use regularly.
articles.summary: Google has updated its AI mode to allow users not just to answer queries but also complete routine tasks within select applications.
points: AI Mode is expanding beyond answering questions and completing routines in regularly used apps
It links with selected Google services like Gmail, Calendar, Drive, etc., for task automation
The update aims to streamline workflows within commonly-used applications

insight.content: Google'nerly integrating AI into routine app interactions is likely aimed at increasing productivity and user engagement with Google services by automating mundane tasks.
insight.sentence: This integration could redefine the standard of digital task management in everyday life, leading to a more efficient use of technology.

articles.title: Google continues its renaming streak by turning NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
articles.description: Google said users can soon access their notebooks through AI Mode in Search.
articles.summary: Gemini is Google's new virtual assistant with a neural engine replacing Bard and the ability to process multiple languages simultaneously.
points: Google has renamed its AI Assistant from 'BARD-AI' to Gemini, reflecting ongoing changes under CEO Sundar Pichai.
Gemini is capable of understanding up to ten different human languages at once and can access information using Google Search queries or voice commands for real-time data retrieval.
Google claims that over 3 million consumers have already tried Gemini, with more than a billion impressions worldwide.
articles.insight: Gemini represents an evolution in AI personal assistants by providing multi-language support and advanced search capabilities, indicating the direction of future intelligent virtual help technologies.

articles.title: Yes, you can now order DoorDash from the command line
articles.description: DoorDash is opening a limited beta of dd-cli, a command-line tool that lets developers and AI agents search stores, build carts, and place orders from the terminal, marking another step toward software designed for AI agents instead of just humans.
articles.summary: DoorDash has released a limited beta version of dd-cli, a command-line tool that enables developers and AI agents to interact with the service by searching stores, building carts, and placing orders via terminal commands.
points: The release marks DoorDash'thy move towards software designed for artificial intelligence (AI) utilization in addition to human users
dd-cli is a command-line tool that enables AI agents or developers to interact with the service by searching stores, building carts and placing orders through terminal commands.
This represents an additional step toward creating technology platforms specifically designed for operating within artificial intelligence environments.
articles.insight: The development of dd-cli indicates a trend in which companies are increasingly designing tools to facilitate interactions between AI agents and their services, representing the growing need for technologies that can cater to these specialized entities alongside traditional human users. This shift towards software designed specifically for non-human intelligences highlights both an innovative approach within IT industries as well as a new wave of potential applications.

articles.title: UK cops say arrest of two young hackers disrupted the operations of an infamous hacking group
articles.description: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair, two members of the prolific Scattered Spider hacking group, pleaded guilty and were sentenced to five years and six months in jail for hacking London’s metropolitan transit system.
articles.summary: Two young British hacker suspects confessed after they pleaded guilty to disrupting the UK'in public transportation systems and were sentenced five years in jail.
points: Owen Flowers and Thalha Jubair, alleged members of Scattered Spider hacking group, admitted guilt for compromising London’s transit system security.
The duo faced a maximum sentence if convicted but pleaded guilty instead, avoiding the full punishment.
This arrest highlights vulnerabilities in city infrastructure and serves as a warning to other would-be hackers.
articles.insight: The apprehension of these young suspects demonstrates an increased resolve by law enforcement agencies worldwide against cybercrimes targeting public services, potentially prompting enhanced security measures in the IT industry and city infrastructures alike.

articles.title: Period tracker Stardust shares users’ health data with analytics firm, says Mozilla research
articles.summary: Stardust period tracker app has shared user health data collected over two years with an external analytics company.
points: Period tracking firm Stardust partnered with a third-party analytics service to share and analyze users' menstrual cycle data.
The sensitive personal information, such as the start dates of periods, was collected without explicit consent from all users since January 2019 through June 2 end
Mozilla research has raised concerns about privacy violations and misleading marketing practices.
articles.insight: This revelation highlights growing scrutiny over data security, transparency, and consent in the tech industry. It underscores a need for stricter regulations to protect user information while maintaining trust between users and service providers.

articles.title: Why is OpenAI selling a ChatGPT basketball?
articles.description: You may have heard that OpenAI released its first piece of hardware this week. You may not have heard about the ChatGPT basketball.
articles.summary: OpenAI has introduced a new AI-powered 'ChatGPT' basketball as part of its hardware venture alongside their popular software models.
points: The ChatGPT basketball is designed to provide interactive experiences, potentially allowing users to control the game using voice commands or text inputs via integration with GPT technology.
This launch represents a significant expansion for OpenAI beyond its AI-driven language models into consumer electronics and gaming peripherals.
The introduction of this hardware product suggests an intention from OpenAI to create multi-modal interactions between humans, computers, and the physical world.
articles.insight: OpenAI' endorses a future where AI technologies are seamlessly integrated into daily life experiences beyond textual communication. This could signify broader implications for personal tech industries aiming to create more immersive user interactions with artificial intelligence.

articles.title: How a former DeepMind researcher raised at a $300M pre-seed valuation before launching a product
articles.description: Drawing on more than a decade spent helping build some of the world's most influential AI systems, including research that later informed the development of ChatGPT, Andrew Dai explains why he believes visual AI is one of the next major frontiers in artificial intelligence.
articles.summary: Andrew Dai discusses his journey from DeepMind researcher to launching a product with pre-seed funding valuation.
points: Dai brings over ten years of experience in building influential AI systems, including work that contributed to ChatGPT'CTF
Believes visual AI is the next major frontier in artificial intelligence based on his experiences at DeepMind.
$300 million pre-seed valuation achieved before product launch.
articles.insight: This article illustrates how experience within a cutting edge organization like DeepMind can provide valuable insights for AI startups, potentially leading to significant initial investments in promising fields such as visual AI.

articles.title: Sheryl Sandberg leads $10 million investment in AI-powered vehicle inspection service
articles.description: The startup, founded in 2021, lets enterprise customers use smartphones to scan and spot vehicle damage.
articles.summary: Sheryl Sandberg-backed AI startup aims at inspecting vehicles using smartphone scans.
points: An investment of $10 million led by Sheryl Sandberg has been made in an IT/technology company specializing in vehicle inspections through the use of artificial intelligence and mobile technology.
The startup, founded just two years ago, enables enterprise customers to conduct real-time scans with their smartphones for spotting damage on vehicles quickly and efficiently.
This investment represents a growing interest in AI applications within industries beyond tech sectors such as automotneries.
articles.insight: The news highlights the increasing integration of artificial intelligence into various business processes, indicating potential industry-wide transformations across different service domains including vehicle maintenance and inspection services. The heavy investment by a high-profile individual like Sheryl Sandberg could also signal growing confidence in AI's applicability beyond traditional tech industries.

articles.title: Why AMI Labs’ Alexandre LeBrun won’t call his AI ‘AGI’ or ‘superintelligence’
articles.description: While everyone in AI is chasing "superintelligence," Alexandre LeBrun, CEO of Yann LeCun’s world model startup, AMI Labs, dismisses the word.
articles.summary: Alexandre LeBrun, leader of an artificial intelligence-focused company called AI Mind Initiative (AMI), has opted not to use terms like 'AGI' or 'superintelligence' for his projects.
points: Alexandre LeBrun is the CEO of a startup founded by Yann LeCun, focused on artificial intelligence models and world representation.

Despite AMI Labs being involved in work that could be labeled as 'superintelligence', Alexandre prefers not to use such terminology due to concerns about creating unrealistic expectations for the field of AI development.
LeBrun believes using terms like AGI or superintelligence may mislead people into thinking these capabilities are closer than they actually might be.
articles.insight: Alexandre LeBrun's approach highlights a growing awareness within the AI community about responsible communication and managing public expectations regarding artificial intelligence advancements. His decision could influence how future innovations in this field are perceived by society at large.

articles.title: Moonshot’s upcoming Kimi 3 is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8
articles.description: The FT reports Kimi K3 will be the largest open AI model from China, with a parameter count between 2 trillion and 3 trillion.
articles.summary: China's deep learning startup Moonshot is developing its Kimi 3 AI model to rival Anthropic's Opus 4.8, with an impressive parameter count of between 2 and 3 trillion.
points: Kimi 3 by Moonshot will have a parameter count ranging from 2 to 3 trillion.
China's largest open AI model is expected to close the gap with Anthropic’s Opus 4.8.
The FT reports on Kimi 3, anticipating its release.
articles.insight: This development suggests a competitive landscape in deep learning capabilities among global tech giants and startups alike.
